effects.effect: You can target 1 Arena either player controls; discard it.

effects.name: Counter Punch
effects.effect: After an Opponent's Vivosaur uses an Attack Skill on this unrested Vivosaur: you can immediately have this Vivosaur use Fist Jab on that Vivosaur, without exerting FP.

effects.name: Fist Flurry
effects.effect: Unrest this Vivosaur, but it cannot use an Attack Skill for the rest of this turn.
